name: verification-agent
description: Same structured reasoning as experiment 3, plus a Sonnet 4.6 verifier agent. The analysis agent must call verify_finding for each vulnerability before including it. The verifier checks: is the undesired operation real, is initial_state correct, do steps follow logically, are conditionals justified, do transformations produce correct out_state, does final state match preconditions. Up to 2 verification attempts per finding; unverified findings are discarded.
